checks.label: Office routine contract status is ready.
Office routine contract is static review-only.
Office routine defines at least six routine moments.
Office routine covers morning, workday, training, evening and safety phases.
Every routine has phase, owner, intent, signals, output and confirmation flag.
Current routines do not write user data.
Routine contract blocks runtime, cloud, publish, push and cost actions.
All safety flags are present and true.

next_actions: Show this routine as a static KosmoOrbit panel.
Later connect routines to local telemetry only after privacy, persistence and owner approval rules are defined.
Keep the current demo in review-only mode until a real local runtime contract exists.
